headerDisplay: For help and support please visit our GitHub Wiki. We hope you find this plugin useful!

enableOnOffLight.title: Enable On/Off Light
enableOnOffLight.description: Enable the on/off light example accessory (Matter Spec § 4.1).

enableDimmableLight.title: Enable Dimmable Light
enableDimmableLight.description: Enable the dimmable light example accessory (Matter Spec § 4.2).

enableColourTemperatureLight.title: Enable Colour Temperature Light
enableColourTemperatureLight.description: Enable the colour temperature light example accessory (Matter Spec § 4.3).

enableColourLight.title: Enable Colour Light (HS)
enableColourLight.description: Enable the colour light (hue/saturation) example accessory (Matter Spec § 4.4).

enableExtendedColourLight.title: Enable Extended Colour Light (HS+CCT)
enableExtendedColourLight.description: Enable the extended colour light (hue/saturation + colour temperature) example accessory (Matter Spec § 4.4).

enableOnOffOutlet.title: Enable On/Off Outlet
enableOnOffOutlet.description: Enable the on/off outlet (smart plug) example accessory (Matter Spec § 5.1).

enableOnOffSwitch.title: Enable On/Off Light Switch
enableOnOffSwitch.description: Enable the on/off light switch example accessory (Matter Spec § 6.1).

enableContactSensor.title: Enable Contact Sensor
enableContactSensor.description: Enable the contact sensor example accessory (Matter Spec § 7.1).

enableOccupancySensor.description: Enable the occupancy sensor example accessory (Matter Spec § 7.3).

enableTemperatureSensor.title: Enable Temperature Sensor
enableTemperatureSensor.description: Enable the temperature sensor example accessory (Matter Spec § 7.4).

enableHumiditySensor.title: Enable Humidity Sensor
enableHumiditySensor.description: Enable the humidity sensor example accessory (Matter Spec § 7.7).

enableSmokeSensor.title: Enable Smoke/CO Alarm
enableSmokeSensor.description: Enable the smoke and carbon monoxide alarm example accessory (Matter Spec § 7.9).

enableLeakSensor.title: Enable Water Leak Detector
enableLeakSensor.description: Enable the water leak detector example accessory (Matter Spec § 7.12).

enableDoorLock.title: Enable Door Lock
enableDoorLock.description: Enable the door lock example accessory (Matter Spec § 8.1).

enableWindowBlind.title: Enable Window Blind
enableWindowBlind.description: Enable the window blind example accessory (Matter Spec § 8.3).

enableVenetianBlind.title: Enable Venetian Blind (Tilt)
enableVenetianBlind.description: Enable the Venetian blind with tilt control example accessory (Matter Spec § 8.3).

enableThermostat.title: Enable Thermostat
enableThermostat.description: Enable the thermostat example accessory (Matter Spec § 9.1).

enableFan.title: Enable Fan
enableFan.description: Enable the fan example accessory (Matter Spec § 9.2).

enableRobotVacuum.title: Enable Robotic Vacuum Cleaner
enableRobotVacuum.description: Enable the robotic vacuum cleaner example accessory (Matter Spec § 12.1). This device is automatically published on its own dedicated Matter bridge for Apple Home compatibility. You'll receive separate commissioning codes (QR code + manual code) for the robot vacuum in the Homebridge logs when Homebridge starts.
